$comment: Schema profile #2 — a THROWAWAY non-beads schema whose only purpose is to prove the use-case-adapter seam (the panel's schema-profile MAJOR): the generic SQL builder must produce correct queries against DIFFERENT table/column/value names with zero code change. Deliberately renames everything beads names (issues->work_items, id->item_id, status->state, closed->done, epic->group).
name: example-generic
